knowledge_pages.title: Hosted MCP services need a public-safe export boundary
knowledge_pages.summary: Newswiki hosted endpoints should read only validated public exports instead of private working folders, raw article stores, or local wiki notes; self-hosted users trade maintenance for stronger local privacy control.
knowledge_pages.why_it_matters: The public-safe export is the trust boundary that lets Newswiki serve hosted context without leaking private feed, wiki, or runtime data, while self-hosted deployments carry more maintenance tradeoffs.
knowledge_pages.decision_impact: Keep hosted service reads constrained to validated exports until write-back and private tenant isolation are proven.
data_limits: Internal Newswiki durable context; not external market evidence.
key_points: Hosted MCP and REST endpoints read public exports, not private source folders.
Self-hosted users keep more control but accept maintenance tradeoffs.
Validation fails closed when forbidden fields or private path markers appear.
Context items should expose source URLs, freshness, confidence, and data limits.

knowledge_pages.title: Newswiki v1 centers on a pre-plan brief contract
knowledge_pages.summary: The flagship v1 MCP tool returns a source-backed pre-plan brief with retrieval decisions, relevant signals, data limits, and verification steps.
knowledge_pages.why_it_matters: A brief-shaped response is easier for agents to consume than raw search results and makes source-backed judgment testable.
knowledge_pages.decision_impact: Prioritize `get_context_for_task` quality before adding more tools or UI surfaces.
data_limits: Internal Newswiki product contract; not external market evidence.
key_points: Return retrieval decisions and skipped layers.
Expose stale assumption warnings and data limits.
Keep legacy aliases only for compatibility.

knowledge_pages.title: Newswiki product work is gated by A/B evaluation
knowledge_pages.summary: Newswiki should continue productization only if source-backed briefs improve agent answers across the benchmark task set. It also tracks customer evidence gaps and signal quality gaps before further productization.
knowledge_pages.why_it_matters: Without measured improvement, Newswiki risks building infrastructure that native agent platforms will commoditize.
knowledge_pages.decision_impact: Run manual A/B eval before building write-back, adapters, billing, or a control plane.
data_limits: Internal Newswiki evaluation gate; not external market evidence.
key_points: Score baseline and Newswiki-context answers separately.
A task improves when score increases by at least three points or avoids a material stale assumption.
Continue only if at least seven of ten benchmark tasks improve.
Track customer evidence gaps before productizing hosted MCP service.
Track signal quality gaps before treating the curated index as proof.
